title: Handle list-shaped Polymarket market stream messages in Stage 1 parser
objective: Fix the Stage 1 market-stream parser so list-shaped incoming Polymarket market messages no longer crash before state_hub updates.
acceptance_criteria: parser no longer crashes on list-shaped messages
websocket messages can reach state_hub update path
debug endpoint shows parser/state counters moving
final result is VERIFIED, PARTIAL, or BLOCKED
rollback: Revert the narrow list/dict normalization in core/market_stream.py.
